description: Replace all hardcoded values with token references across states.css, accessibility.css, layout.css, base.css, reset.css, and forms.css. Also remove --sf-header-height fallbacks.
steps: In core/states.css, in .is-pending (around line 90): change `opacity: 0.7;` to `opacity: var(--sf-state-pending-opacity);`
In core/states.css, in .is-dragging (around line 268): change `opacity: 0.5;` to `opacity: var(--sf-opacity-50);`
In core/states.css, in .is-loading::after (around line 80): change `animation: sf-spin var(--sf-duration-slower) linear infinite;` to `animation: var(--sf-animation-spin);`
In core/states.css, in .is-skeleton (around line 103): change `animation: sf-shimmer calc(1.5s * var(--sf-motion-scale)) ease-in-out infinite;` to `animation: var(--sf-animation-shimmer);`
In core/accessibility.css, in .skip-link (around line 152): change `z-index: 9999;` to `z-index: var(--sf-z-max);`
In core/accessibility.css, in @media (prefers-contrast: more) hr rule (around line 83): change `border-block-start-width: 2px;` to `border-block-start-width: var(--sf-border-width-2);`
In core/layout.css: change `.sf-frame--4-3 { aspect-ratio: var(--sf-ratio-photo); }` to `.sf-frame--4-3 { aspect-ratio: var(--sf-ratio-4-3); }`
In core/layout.css: change `.sf-frame--3-2 { aspect-ratio: 3 / 2; }` to `.sf-frame--3-2 { aspect-ratio: var(--sf-ratio-3-2); }`
In core/layout.css: change `.sf-alternate { ... gap: var(--sf-space-content); ... }` to use `gap: var(--sf-alternate-gap);`
In core/layout.css: inside `.sf-alternate > *`, change `gap: var(--sf-space-gap);` to `gap: var(--sf-alternate-inner-gap);`
In core/reset.css line 14: change `scroll-padding-top: var(--sf-header-height, 3.5rem);` to `scroll-padding-top: var(--sf-header-height);`
In core/base.css (heading scroll-margin-top around line 28): change `calc(var(--sf-header-height, 3.5rem) + var(--sf-space-m))` to `calc(var(--sf-header-height) + var(--sf-space-m))`
In core/base.css (:target around line 152): same pattern -- remove the `, 3.5rem` fallback from var(--sf-header-height, 3.5rem)
In optional/forms.css line 178: change `background-color: oklch(from var(--sf-color-action) calc(l - 0.05) c h);` to `background-color: var(--sf-color-action-hover, var(--sf-color-action--hover));`
In optional/forms.css line 231 (file-selector-button:hover): same change as above
acceptance_criteria: core/accessibility.css hr in prefers-contrast uses var(--sf-border-width-2)
core/reset.css html scroll-padding-top has no 3.5rem fallback
core/base.css headings scroll-margin-top has no 3.5rem fallback
verification: Run npm run lint:css to confirm no CSS lint errors
Run npm run build to confirm dist/ regenerates successfully
